ODDMELT-DEFEND_ODDMELT.title: Defend
ODDMELT-SPLATTER.title: Splatter
ODDMELT-SPLATTER.description:
Apply {Debuff:diff()} [gold]Bind[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Apply {Debuff2:diff()} [gold]Bind[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ODDMELT-LOOSE_THREADS.title: Loose Threads
ODDMELT-FORMING.title: Forming
ODDMELT-NEEDLEWORK.title: Needlework
ODDMELT-REPURPOSE.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Discard[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
ODDMELT-REPURPOSE.title: Repurpose
ODDMELT-REPURPOSE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
ODDMELT-OUTRAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Apply {Bind:diff()} [gold]Bind[/gold] to yourself.
ODDMELT-OUTRAGE.title: Outrage
ODDMELT-WIRECASTING.title: Wirecasting
ODDMELT-IMPACT_PREP.title: Impact Prep
ODDMELT-IMPACT_PREP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Gain {Block2:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
ODDMELT-ETCHING.title: Etching
ODDMELT-DREDGE.title: Dredge
ODDMELT-ROTATION.title: Rotation
ODDMELT-TEARAWAY.title: Tearaway
ODDMELT-TEARAWAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ODDMELT-TEARAWAY.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
ODDMELT-MASS_EXPULSION.title: Mass Expulsion
ODDMELT-MASS_EXPULSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} {Hits:plural:time|times}.
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Hit twice as many times.
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Hit twice as many times.{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Dissolve[/gold] {Dissolve:diff()}: Hit twice as many times.}
ODDMELT-WEAVE.title: Weave
ODDMELT-LEAP.title: Leap
ODDMELT-STICKY_SNARE.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} it costs.
ODDMELT-STICKY_SNARE.title: Sticky Snare
ODDMELT-STICKY_SNARE.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
ODDMELT-INSTINCT.description: When drawn or played, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
ODDMELT-INSTINCT.title: Instinct
